nodes.name: Mountain honeyeater
nodes.summary: Mountain honeyeater（Meliphaga orientalis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mountain honeyeater。

nodes.name: Meliphaga
nodes.summary: Meliphaga（Meliphaga）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联17种鸟类，如Puff-backed honeyeater、Yellow-spotted honeyeater、Lewin's honeyeater等17种鸟类。

nodes.name: Mountain honeyeater
nodes.summary: The mountain honeyeater (Meliphaga orientalis), hill-forest honeyeater or mountain meliphaga, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae that is found throughout New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References External links ITIS report: Meliphaga orientalis.
